testsuites.name: E-Commerce API Test Suite - Expert Level

testcase.name: [User] Each user should have required fields
[User] User email should be valid format
[User] Response time should be less than 2s
[User] Store first user ID for后续 tests
[User] Should create new user

failure.message: expected undefined to equal 'Test User'

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ecommerce-test-suite-001. Collection name: E-Commerce API Test Suite - Expert Level. Request name: 01-User Management / 04-Create User. Test description: [User] Should create new user. Error message: expected undefined to equal 'Test User'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to equal 'Test User' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:4).

testcase.name: [User] Should update existing user

failure.message: expected undefined to equal 'Updated User Name'

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ecommerce-test-suite-001. Collection name: E-Commerce API Test Suite - Expert Level. Request name: 01-User Management / 05-Update User (PUT). Test description: [User] Should update existing user. Error message: expected undefined to equal 'Updated User Name'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to equal 'Updated User Name' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:5).

testcase.name: [Negative] Should return empty object for non-existent user
[Negative] Should still create user (API accepts any)

testsuite.name: 07-Negative Tests / 03-Get User with Invalid ID Format
07-Negative Tests / 04-Create Post with Missing Required Fields

failure.message: Response is not valid JSON

testcase.name: [Negative] Should return success for non-existent delete
[Enhanced-003] User name should match request

failure.message: Created user name does not match request. Expected: TestUser_1772792787669, Got: undefined: expected undefined to equal 'TestUser_1772792787669'

testcase.name: [Enhanced-011] User should be updated successfully

failure.message: User update failed. Expected 200, got 500. Possible causes: invalid user ID, server error, or permission issue.: expected 500 to equal 200

testcase.name: [Workflow-002] Data should flow through workflow

failure.message: Email should contain @ for valid data: the given combination of arguments (undefined and string) is invalid for this assertion. You can use an array, a map, an object, a set, a string, or a weakset instead of a string

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ecommerce-test-suite-001. Collection name: E-Commerce API Test Suite - Expert Level. Request name: 08-Enhanced Testing (Data-Driven & Correlation) / 05-Workflow Test (Full User Journey). Test description: [Workflow-002] Data should flow through workflow. Error message: Email should contain @ for valid data: the given combination of arguments (undefined and string) is invalid for this assertion. You can use an array, a map, an object, a set, a string, or a weakset instead of a string. You can use an array, a map, an object, a set, a string, or a weakset instead of a string at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:65).
